title: ctenitis bullata
intro: Ctenitis bullata, also known as the bullate ctenitis or Chinese lip fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia. The medicinal properties of Ctenitis bullata include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Ctenitis bullata include infusions, decoctions, and powders, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses.
